parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide circle
hide methods
hide empty members

class "app_translation\n((Translations))" as app_translation << (I, #428bca) >> {
  {field} label string
  {field} description longText
  {field} privacyPolicyExtensions longText
  {field} createdAt createdAt
  {field} updatedAt updatedAt
  {field} **appId** foreignKey
  {field} **languageId** foreignKey
}

class "app_action_button_translation\n((Translations))" as app_action_button_translation << (I, #428bca) >> {
  {field} label string
  {field} createdAt createdAt
  {field} updatedAt updatedAt
  {field} **appActionButtonId** foreignKey
  {field} **languageId** foreignKey
}

class "language" as language << (T, #a9a9a9) >>

class "app_action_button\n(App action buttons)" as app_action_button << (T, #ffb6c1) >> {
  {field} **id** id
  {field} entity string
  {field} view string
  {field} url string
  {field} action string
  {field} openNewTab bool
  {field} label translated
  {field} appId foreignKey
  {field} createdAt createdAt
  {field} updatedAt updatedAt
  {field} translated json
}

class "app_template\n(App templates)" as app_template << (T, #ffb6c1) >> {
  {field} **id** id
  {field} template longText
  {field} path string
  {field} active bool
  {field} appId foreignKey
  {field} createdAt createdAt
  {field} updatedAt updatedAt
}

class "app\n(Apps)" as app << (T, #ffb6c1) >> {
  {field} **id** id
  {field} name string
  {field} path string
  {field} author string
  {field} copyright string
  {field} license string
  {field} active bool
  {field} configurable bool
  {field} privacy string
  {field} version string
  {field} iconRaw blob
  {field} icon string
  {field} appSecret string
  {field} modules list
  {field} cookies list
  {field} label translated
  {field} description translated
  {field} privacyPolicyExtensions translated
  {field} integrationId foreignKey
  {field} aclRoleId foreignKey
  {field} createdAt createdAt
  {field} updatedAt updatedAt
  {field} translated json
}

class "integration" as integration << (T, #a9a9a9) >>
class "acl_role" as acl_role << (T, #a9a9a9) >>
class "custom_field_set" as custom_field_set << (T, #a9a9a9) >>
class "webhook" as webhook << (T, #a9a9a9) >>

app_translation --> language
app_translation --> app
app_action_button_translation --> language
app_action_button_translation --> app_action_button
app_action_button --> app
app_template --> app
app --> integration
app --> acl_role
app --> custom_field_set
app --> webhook

@enduml
```
